findings.message: The `widgetizer` runtime service is defined only in `dev.yml`, a dev-scoped overlay. The deploy composition for staging/prod is `<env>.yml + services.yml + observability.yml` (per infra/deploy/strategy.sh and infra/deploy/README.md) and does NOT include dev.yml, so widgetizer reaches dev only and is silently absent from staging/prod. It connects to the app database (WIDGETIZER_DB_URL -> postgres) and is plainly not local-developer-experience tooling (not a TLS terminator, mail catcher, or DB admin UI), so it is a real backend service that the app likely depends on at runtime. This is a service-parity gap that ships the missing service twice (staging, then prod).
findings.suggestion: Move the widgetizer service to infra/compose/services.yml (the battery overlay that staging/prod compose) so it reaches every deployed environment, or define it in the deployed <env>.yml overlays. If it is genuinely dev-only, record that opt-out in the decisions log rather than leaving it as a silent omission. Do NOT add it to base.yml (dev/test-only).
